display.name: Table Set by Nothing
display.short_description: A stump is laid like a tiny supper table. One bowl smells warm and impossible. A wrapped bundle beside it looks real enough to steal.

choices.label: Eat the sweet-smelling stew
choices.summary: The first mouthful tastes like home. The second leaves your stomach emptier than before.

choices.label: Claim the wrapped bundle
choices.summary: There is no food in the cloth, only a sound edge and a whetstone strip you can use right now.
